title: Academic Tracks Research
content:
Special Programs - Tracks and Research
Morgan State University - Computer Science Department

NEW TRACKS UNDER BS IN COMPUTER SCIENCE

1. Quantum Computing Track
   - Focus on quantum computing fundamentals
   - Prepare for emerging quantum technologies
   - Select electives in quantum computing area

2. Cybersecurity and AI Track
   - Combine security with artificial intelligence
   - Prepare for security analyst and AI roles
   - Select electives in cybersecurity and AI areas

Note: There are no additional courses required, but students need to select the electives that fall under each track to meet the requirements of each track.

---

RESEARCH OPPORTUNITIES

The Computer Science Department offers research opportunities with faculty in areas including:
- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- Robotics and Motion Planning
- Cybersecurity and Cryptography
- Human-Computer Interaction
- Quantum Computing
- Bioinformatics
- Big Data and Data Science

Contact individual faculty members to learn about current research opportunities.

Research and Internship Opportunities Spreadsheet:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TczO-DhiHnqeMJ6q875rRxLfhRkV7abe-WfZQiQ7eJY/edit?gid=0#gid=0

SCMNS Research and Internships Page:
https://www.morgan.edu/school-of-computer-mathematical-and-natural-sciences/students/research-and-internships
